title: Demon Blood applies Atk plus three while equipped

card.rawText: Atk: +3. The equipped creature is changed to Demon-type.

plan.title: Demon Blood applies Atk plus three while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Demon Blood to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Atk bonus through battle damage.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Demon Blood.

steps: Player 1 plays Demon Blood and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the separate printed type-change effect makes the equipped creature Demon-type while equipped.
riskNotes: This fixture covers only the Atk modifier effect; type change is effect 096-E01.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Demon Blood Atk equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
